anti_gaming: No query text or expected filename may appear in retrieval routing code.
Targets and thresholds are immutable after the first test-corpus query.
Dense similarity may generate candidates but cannot satisfy a multi-document relationship target alone without returned source evidence.
Negative controls must fail closed on every tier.
Only the new corpus ID discovered from the create API response may be queried or written.
